name: Fake Gate
description: Focuses on injecting Webshells and Backdoor scripts into vulnerable servers, specifically targeting WordPress and K8s environments.

name: Green Recruit
description: A targeted Spear Phishing campaign exploiting HR themes, new employee recruitment, and benefits updates to steal credentials.

name: Silver Shadow
description: Sophisticated operations involving the use of Cobalt Strike for lateral movement and C2 communications within corporate networks.

name: Urgent Wire
description: A Business Email Compromise (BEC) scam attempting to defraud finance departments via urgent wire transfer requests from spoofed executives.

name: Cloud Drain
description: Large-scale credential harvesting targeting cloud services like Office 365, Firebase, and S3 through fake landing pages and MFA bypass attempts.

name: Bit Snatcher
description: Distribution of Infostealers and RATs aimed at exfiltrating browser passwords, crypto wallets, and local sensitive files.

name: Vocal Proxy
description: Aggressive scanning and reconnaissance campaign targeting exposed RDP, SSH, and Redis services to build a proxy network or botnet.

name: Vulnerable Echo
description: Exploitation of known N-Day vulnerabilities, such as Log4j and Exchange flaws, for remote code execution on unpatched systems.
